## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits format on every commit
- [ ] Every commit has a `Signed-off-by:` line (DCO; `git commit -s`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated where applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable
- [ ] CI green
